race.comment: NUNS CHORUS (8) progressive filly who got the Maiden win out of the way in dominant style over 1100m at Goulburn. From a good yard and can go on with now with the key jockey change.  VEXXY (7) nice mare resuming. Unwanted in betting on debut when she motored late with slick victory over 1250m at this track last September. Two good trials should have her ready for this. HARD JAKKA (2) third-up today and ready for this trip and further now. Strong through the line in the heavy conditions to run third over 1000m at Taree. Proven at this level and no surprise to see him take this out. ONE RUN WON (4) went under narrowly first-up, then failed to close off with a disappointing fifth over 1200m at this track. Fitter now from the good gate.
